title: Core Systems a GMP Audit Must Cover
alt: Five core quality systems covered by a GMP audit checklist

items.label: Quality System & Docs
items.desc: Site Master File, SOPs, quality manual, management review

items.label: Personnel & Training
items.desc: Org chart, QP roles, effectiveness-verified training

items.label: Production & Suppliers
items.desc: Approved supplier list, material release, batch records

items.label: Quality Control Lab
items.desc: Validated methods, OOS investigations, stability data
